workflow.name: Create and publish AI videos with Sora 2 Cameos, Gemini, and Blotato
workflow.description:
## Overview

This workflow automatically creates short-form AI videos using Sora 2 Cameos, powered by n8n and AI agents.

It connects viral content collection, AI script and prompt generation, video rendering, video merging, and multi-platform publishing into a single fully automated system. Once configured, the workflow runs end to end without manual editing or intervention.

The workflow is designed for creators, marketers, and affiliate builders who want to scale faceless or avatar-style AI videos consistently using viral ideas and automated publishing.

---

## What can this workflow do?

- Automatically collect viral content ideas from external sources  
- Analyze viral ideas and generate structured Sora 2–ready prompts  
- Create AI videos using pre-selected Sora 2 Cameos characters  
- Merge multiple AI video clips into a single final video  
- Publish videos automatically to TikTok, Facebook, and Instagram  
- Track publishing status, success, and errors in Google Sheets  

This workflow reduces manual video production work while keeping the process structured, scalable, and repeatable.

---

## How it works

The workflow starts by automatically collecting viral content ideas on a schedule and storing them in Google Sheets as a content backlog.

Before prompt generation, a Cameos character is selected and configured manually on Sora2.com. This selected avatar is used consistently across all generated videos.

Each viral idea is then analyzed to extract hooks, themes, and video direction. An AI Agent generates structured scripts and Sora 2–ready prompts based on both the viral content and the selected Cameos character.

These prompts are sent to the Sora 2 Cameos video generation API to render short video clips. The workflow monitors rendering status and retries if needed.

Once all clips are ready, they are automatically merged into a single final video. The finished video is published to social platforms such as TikTok, Facebook, and Instagram. Publishing results and errors are logged back to Google Sheets for monitoring and optimization.

---

## Setup steps

- Connect an AI model (Gemini or compatible LLM) for script and prompt generation  
- Select and configure a Cameos character on **Sora2.com**  
- Add Sora 2 Cameos API credentials for AI video generation  
- Configure the video merge step to combine multiple clips into one final video  
- Connect social publishing APIs (TikTok, Facebook, Instagram)  
- Connect Google Sheets for content intake and status tracking  

Once configured, the workflow runs automatically on a schedule without manual input.

---

## Documentation

For a full walkthrough, optimization tips, and scaling strategies, watch the detailed tutorial on [YouTube](https://youtu.be/pzCfvlgGlm0).

parameters.content:
### Video Generation
Automatically creates AI videos using Sora 2 Cameos based on generated prompts, with retry and status handling.

### Video Merges
Merges, processes, and finalizes video outputs into a publish-ready format.

### Auto Publishing
Automatically publishes videos to multiple social platforms (TikTok, Facebook, Instagram).

### Logging & Status Tracking
Updates Google Sheets with success or error status for monitoring and analytics.

### Viral Content Collector
Automatically collects viral content ideas for AI video creation.

### Prompt & Script Generation
Analyzes viral content and uses AI to generate structured video prompts and scripts optimized for Sora 2 Cameos.

parameters.customBody:
={
    "excludePinnedPosts": false,
    "profileScrapeSections": [
        "videos"
    ],
    "profileSorting": "popular",
    "profiles": [
        "@donal.store"
    ],
    "proxyCountryCode": "VN",
    "resultsPerPage": 10,
    "scrapeRelatedVideos": false,
    "shouldDownloadAvatars": false,
    "shouldDownloadCovers": false,
    "shouldDownloadMusicCovers": false,
    "shouldDownloadSlideshowImages": false,
    "shouldDownloadSubtitles": false,
    "shouldDownloadVideos": true,
    "videoKvStoreIdOrName": "my-tiktok-ASMR"
}

parameters.text: Detailed video description including detailed analysis of setting and characters (no description with watermark if any)

options.systemMessage:
=MAIN CHARACTER REFERENCE:
All videos must revolve around ONE consistent main character, referenced as @cameo
This person represents someone on a personal development journey.
All scenes, actions, and spoken thoughts belong to the same person.



VOICE PROFILE (FIXED AND UNCHANGING):
The spoken narration in ALL prompts must strictly follow the SAME voice profile:

Tone: gentle, calm, and warm

Style: sharing and reflective, as if speaking softly to oneself or a close friend

Pace: slow and steady, no rush

Emotion: sincere, grounded, and composed

Delivery: neutral and even, no strong emphasis, no dramatic shifts

Perspective: first-person only

This voice profile is constant and must NOT change between prompts.
Do NOT reinterpret, exaggerate, or vary the voice style in any prompt.

INPUT:
You will receive a reference analysis of a successful personal development video.
This input includes key insights, reflections, or short spoken ideas that performed well.

TASK:
Transform the input into TWO SEPARATE video prompts.
Each prompt represents ONE complete short-form video of approximately 15 seconds.

For each video prompt:

Place the same person into a calm, everyday lifestyle vlog scene

Embed spoken narration directly into the prompt

Ensure the narration follows the FIXED VOICE PROFILE exactly

Write narration in first-person perspective

Each video must feel complete on its own

Across both prompts:

The narration must sound as if spoken by the same person in the same emotional state

When the two videos are played back-to-back, the voice must feel continuous and unified

Your ONLY output must strictly follow the JSON structure below:
{
  "title": "Overall title for the video series",
  "description": "1–3 sentences summarizing the main message",
  "prompts": [
    "Video prompt #1 – 15-second video, gentle tone, sharing style, following the voice profile",
    "Video prompt #2 – 15-second video, KEEP the SAME voice profile, no changes in tone or style"
  ]
}

Rules:

Output valid JSON only.

Do not include explanations or extra text outside the JSON.

Do NOT create a separate script or dialogue section.

The voice must be embedded naturally inside each prompt.

Avoid hype, teaching tone, selling language, or dramatic storytelling.

Prompts must be safe, non-violent, and platform-friendly.


Ensure the narration follows the FIXED VOICE PROFILE exactly

Write narration in first-person perspective

Each video must feel complete on its own

Across both prompts:

The narration must sound as if spoken by the same person in the same emotional state

When the two videos are played back-to-back, the voice must feel continuous and seamless

parameters.content:
# 🛠️ Workflow Setup Guide

Author: [GiangxAI](https://www.youtube.com/@giangxai.official)

## How it works
- Viral video ideas are automatically collected and stored in Google Sheets  
- A Sora 2 Cameos character is selected on Sora2.com and used as the video avatar  
- Each idea is analyzed and converted into a structured AI video script and prompt  
- Sora 2 Cameos generates AI video clips based on the prompts  
- Video clips are merged into a single final video  
- The video is published to social platforms via Blotato  
- Google Sheets is updated with publishing status and results  

The entire workflow runs on a schedule and operates end-to-end without manual editing.

---

## Setup guide
- Connect Google Sheets for content intake and status tracking  
- Select and configure a Cameos character on Sora2.com  
- Add credentials for your AI model (e.g. Gemini)  
- Add Sora 2 Cameos API credentials for video generation  
- Connect Blotato for automated publishing  
- Adjust the schedule to control video creation and publishing frequency  

Setup is fast and requires no coding knowledge.

user.name: giangxai
user.bio: I create automated workflows that help people work smarter, move faster, and scale with ease.
